security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; frame-src 'none'; form-action 'none'

bundle.longDescription: LocalPass desktop GUI — a fully local, offline password and secrets manager. Renders the vault via a thin daemon client; all secret handling stays in Rust.
